sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96342" key="staxuhtro/fos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στᾰχῠη-τρόφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n96342.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">nourishing ears of corn</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">αὖλαξ</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0118.tlg001:7:209" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.209</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
